PropertyRenderer.name: C9testrenderer
PropertyRenderer.script: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <icons Version="1.0"> <primaryIcon source="C9icons8-pixel-star-16-transparent.png"/> <overlayIcon source="checked_out" mapName="CheckedOutMap" /> <propertyMap name="CheckedOutMap"> <item key="Y" value="C9icons8-pixel-star-16 black.png"/> <item key="N" value="C9icons8-pixel-star-16-yellow.png"/> <item key=" " value="C9icons8-pixel-star-16-transparent.png" /> </propertyMap> </icons>
